user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter WFH requests by period, status, employee class and department, so that I can find the requests relevant to me
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Work From Home Request screen; When I set period, status, employee class or department and click Search; Then only matching WFH requests are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter WFH requests by statuses such as Pending with me, Approved, Rejected and Cancelled, so that I can prioritise pending approvals
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Work From Home Request screen; When I select the Pending with me status; Then only requests awaiting my action are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to assign a new WFH request on behalf of an employee, so that I can record remote work when required
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Work From Home Request screen; When I click Assign new request and submit the details; Then a new WFH request is created and appears in the list

user_story: As a Manager, I want to see from/to date time and number of days or hours per request, so that I can review the WFH duration before deciding
acceptance_criteria: Given WFH requests exist; When the grid loads; Then columns for employee code, employee name, employee class, department, from date time, to date time, number of days / hours and status are shown

user_story: As a Manager, I want to approve or reject WFH requests via the Task column, so that employees receive a timely decision on remote work
acceptance_criteria: Given a WFH request is pending; When I act on the Task column; Then the request status is updated to Approved or Rejected

user_story: As a Manager, I want to toggle active and inactive employees and refresh the list, so that I keep the WFH request view current
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Work From Home Request screen; When I switch between Active and Inactive employees and click Refresh; Then the list updates to the selected group
